content: getclassmetatags  Table of contents Prototype: getclassmetatags(classname, optional_tag) Return type: slist Description: Returns the list of meta tags for class classname . Arguments: classname : string - Class identifier - in the range: [a-zA-Z0-9_$(){}\[\].:]+ The optional_tag can be used to look up a specific tag's value. If you format your tags like meta => { "mykey=myvalue1", "mykey=myvalue2"} then the optional_tag of mykey will fetch you a list with two entries, { "myvalue1", "myvalue2" } . Example: code body common control { bundlesequence => { "example" }; } bundle agent example { classes : "c" expression => "any" , meta => { "mytag" , "other=once" , "other=twice" }; vars : " ctags " slist => getclassmetatags ( "c" ); " othertag_values " slist => getclassmetatags ( "c" , "other" ); reports : "Found tags: $(ctags) " ; "Found tags for key 'other': $(othertag_values) " ; } Output: code R: Found tags: source=promise R: Found tags: mytag R: Found tags: other=once R: Found tags: other=twice R: Found tags for key 'other': once R: Found tags for key 'other': twice Notes: See also: getvariablemetatags() History: Function added in 3.6.0. optional_tag added in 3.10.0
